sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88005" key="prometre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προμετρ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n88005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measure out before,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.166</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ὁμήρῳ ἀρκέσει -μετρηθὲν τὸ τῆς τιμῆς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.3e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
